content:
IVX PROJECT CARDS — INSTAGRAM-STYLE VIDEO + ENGAGEMENT

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Goal:
Upgrade every project card on the landing page and app with premium video, likes, comments, share, and investor engagement.

Build same synced experience for:
- ivxholding.com landing page
- chat.ivxholding.com app
- mobile app screens

FEATURES

1. Project Card Video
Each project card must support:
- high-quality video upload
- vertical video
- horizontal video
- thumbnail preview
- autoplay muted on scroll
- tap to expand
- pause/play
- progress bar
- compressed optimized delivery
- mobile-first playback

2. Media Upload
Allow owner/admin to upload:
- photos
- videos
- cover image
- project walkthrough
- construction update video
- investor presentation video

3. Instagram-Style Engagement
Each project card must include:
- Like
- Comment
- Share
- Save
- View details
- Invest interest
- Contact IVX
- Follow project updates

4. Comments
Comments must support:
- user comments
- owner replies
- moderation
- delete/report
- timestamps
- comment count

5. Share
Share options:
- copy link
- WhatsApp
- SMS
- email
- social share
- investor referral link

6. Analytics
Track:
- video views
- average watch time
- likes
- comments
- shares
- saves
- investor clicks
- Invest Now clicks
- lead conversion

7. Database
Create/update tables:
- project_media
- project_videos
- project_likes
- project_comments
- project_shares
- project_saves
- project_analytics

8. Admin / Owner Controls
Owner can:
- upload video
- replace video
- choose cover image
- pin best video
- approve comments
- remove comments
- see analytics per project

9. Landing Page Sync
Landing page cards must show:
- video hero preview
- like count
- comment count
- share button
- save button
- Invest Now CTA

10. App Sync
App project cards must show same:
- videos
- likes
- comments
- shares
- saves
- analytics
- investment CTA

11. Performance
Use:
- lazy loading
- video compression
- thumbnails
- CDN/cache
- skeleton loading
- mobile optimization

12. Compliance Rule
Do not show misleading ROI.
Do not allow fake testimonials.
Do not allow unapproved investor claims.
All investment content must be owner-approved.

DEPLOYMENT

After implementation:
1. Run typecheck
2. Run tests
3. Commit to GitHub
4. Push to main
5. Trigger Render deploy
6. Verify production

FINAL PROOF

Return:

REPO:
BRANCH:
COMMIT_SHA:
FILES_CHANGED:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
HEALTH_STATUS:
LANDING_PROJECT_VIDEO_STATUS:
APP_PROJECT_VIDEO_STATUS:
LIKE_STATUS:
COMMENT_STATUS:
SHARE_STATUS:
SAVE_STATUS:
ANALYTICS_STATUS:
ADMIN_UPLOAD_STATUS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

COMPLETE only if project videos, likes, comments, shares, saves, and analytics work on both landing page and app.
